full_text:
Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Long-term organoid establishment

1 E6 cells were given to Joonas/Nika for long-term organoid establishment.

Biobanking

3 vials of 3.67 E6 cells each were frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

 | viability [%] | 77.1
 | size [µm] | 8.5

 | size [µm] | 8.4
